# Kotacom IT Service & Publications
> Solusi IT & Digital Terpadu untuk Bisnis Anda

Website: https://kotacom.id
Location: Surabaya, Indonesia

## Core Services
1. **IT Support & Maintenance**
   - Jasa service komputer & instalasi jaringan
   - Recovery data & upgrade infrastruktur IT
2. **Website & Software Development**
   - Jasa pembuatan website company profile, e-commerce, custom web apps
   - Pembuatan software custom (POS, ERP, SIMRS, Koperasi)
3. **Printing Services (Percetakan)**
   - Cetak buku (POD & offset), cetak kalender, brosur, map ijazah

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Astro, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Laravel, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- CMS: Sanity.io

## Additional Notes
- Target clients include UMKM, corporations, schools, and hospitals in Surabaya and across Indonesia.
- Kotacom also provides hardware procurement (Pengadaan) and social media management.
